data.acceptance: 1. Normal take and scene dispatch cannot select cli-arg one-shot transport for providers that support interactive sessions. 2. Custom prompt execution for a take/scene beat still uses the provider interactive transport when available. 3. If an agent lacks interactive support for take/scene, Foolery fails loudly with a clear error instead of falling back to one-shot. 4. Automated tests cover OpenCode and Codex custom-prompt take/scene selection plus the loud failure branch. 5. Approval harness no longer depends on a one-shot take path. 6. Lint, typecheck, tests, and build pass.
